content: We can frame the original task-agnostic Self-Refine framework as a foundational base that can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that requires no external supervision or training. This new pipeline would resolve the limitation of single-perspective feedback in the original Self-Refine framework, which often gets stuck in local optimization loops where the model cannot catch its own blind spots.
